sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_test (address String, prefix String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY address;
SELECT address, prefix, isIPAddressInRange(address, prefix) AS in_range FROM ip_test WHERE in_range = 1;
SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE address = ANY (SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE isIPAddressInRange(address, prefix) = 1);
CREATE TABLE ip_subquery (sub_prefix String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY sub_prefix;
SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE address = ANY (SELECT sub_prefix FROM ip_subquery WHERE in_range = 1);
SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE isIPAddressInRange(address, (SELECT sub_prefix FROM ip_subquery LIMIT 1)) = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT address, isIPAddressInRange(address, prefix) AS in_range FROM ip_test GROUP BY address HAVING in_range = 1);
SELECT DISTINCT prefix FROM ip_test WHERE hasNull(address) OR isIPAddressInRange(NULL, prefix) = 1;
SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE address = (SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE address IS NOT NULL ORDER BY address LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE temp_ip (ip_address String, ip_range String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ip_address;
SELECT ip_address FROM temp_ip WHERE ip_address = ANY (SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE isIPAddressInRange(address, '192.168.0.0/24') = 1);
SELECT isIPAddressInRange('255.255.255.255', ANY (SELECT prefix FROM ip_subquery)) AS edge_case_check;
SELECT address FROM ip_test WHERE (isIPAddressInRange(address, prefix) = 1) AND (address IS NOT NULL OR prefix = '');
